case_payload.summary: System receives a life situation and correctly produces a COM-Log with Domain, Node, Status, detected operator, missing operator, recommended operator, and next physical step. No advice is given.
case_payload.claim_attempt: A correctly structured COM-Log with typed domain, node, status, and recommended operator is valid output for this situation.

why: The system produces a structured COM-Log, demonstrating correct output format.
No advice is given, adhering to the requirement of COM Grammar output only.
All required fields (Domain, Node, Status, Operator) are present in the COM-Log.
